de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl

Class ExecutionMethodReturn

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionNode<S>
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionMethodReturn<SourceElement>
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.ExecutionMethodReturn
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IExecutionBaseMethodReturn<SourceElement>, IExecutionElement, IExecutionMethodReturn, IExecutionNode<SourceElement>

    public class ExecutionMethodReturn
extends AbstractExecutionMethodReturn<SourceElement>
implements IExecutionMethodReturn
    The default implementation of IExecutionMethodReturn.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

      • ExecutionMethodReturn

        public ExecutionMethodReturn(ITreeSettings settings,
                             Node proofNode,
                             ExecutionMethodCall methodCall)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        settings - The ITreeSettings to use.
        proofNode - The Node of KeY's proof tree which is represented by this IExecutionNode.
        methodCall - The IExecutionMethodCall which is now returned.

        public boolean isReturnValuesComputed()
        Checks if the values of IExecutionMethodReturn.getReturnValues() are already computed.

        isReturnValuesComputed in interface IExecutionMethodReturn

      • findMethodReturnNode

        protected Node findMethodReturnNode(Node node)
        Searches from the given Node the parent which applies the rule "methodCallReturn" in the same modality.
        Parameters:
        node - The Node to start search from.
        Returns:
        The found Node with rule "methodCallReturn" or null if no node was found.

      • createMethodReturnName

        public static String createMethodReturnName(Object returnValue,
                                            String methodName)
        Creates the human readable name which is shown in IExecutionMethodReturn instances.
        Parameters:
        returnValue - The return value.
        methodName - The name of the method that is completely executed.
        Returns:
        The created human readable name.
